title: Make approve optional and have apply enter execution
description: Update FlowForge lifecycle so approve is optional and apply materializes tasks then starts implementation work by claiming ready Beads tasks.

title: Separate classification mechanics from project rules
description: Move generic exploration classification fields and target derivation guidance into FlowForge core docs, leaving installed project rules as project-level classification configuration only.

title: Add FlowForge exploration classification seed rule
description: Add a default project rule that classifies newly discovered exploration information into module, architecture, convention, decision, or exploration buckets, including module_name-driven routing guidance.

title: Add intake package scaffolding and exploration seed context helpers
description: Provide an executable intake package generator plus intake and exploration context helpers so project rules and user-provided intake materials can be assembled into a concrete pre-exploration input bundle.
close_reason: Implemented rules bundle, intake package helpers, command wiring, template updates, and verified helper outputs

title: Add executable helper for FlowForge project rules context
description: Add a thin CLI helper that reads the installed project rule bundle in canonical order and emits a deterministic context block, then wire it into the managed script bundle and documentation.

title: Introduce a canonical rule-loading protocol for FlowForge adapters
description: Extract the project rule bundle loading order into a single canonical guide and update skill and command surfaces to reference that guide instead of repeating the same instructions in every wrapper.

title: Load project seed rules into FlowForge skill and commands
description: Ensure the installed project seed rules bundle is explicitly read by the FlowForge skill and command surfaces before workflow actions, so project rules actually participate in exploration, proposal, archive, and status reasoning.

title: Collapse model template parts into a single document
description: Simplify the default model template so projects copy and edit one complete document instead of coordinating a split parts directory. Update the surrounding guidance and remove the default parts-based reading path.

title: Split workflow guidance into core docs and project seed rules
description: Audit existing FlowForge workflow guidance, keep stable platform mechanisms in core, and move project-default working guidance into a seed rules template that is installed into projects.

title: Freeze core conclusions for input package and workflow rules
description: Capture the currently agreed conclusions about input packages, workflow-level rules, and the split between core FlowForge behavior and project-installed seed rules before decomposing existing workflow content.

title: Define Obsidian-compatible frontmatter for FlowForge docs
description: Design and implement per-document frontmatter metadata for FlowForge markdown artifacts, keep body content substantive, and update workflow docs/templates/validation so explorations, proposals, designs, models, findings, and conventions each expose their own minimal attributes while meta.yaml remains proposal-level only.
close_reason: Document frontmatter workflow implemented and smoke-validated

title: Upgrade FlowForge ownership summaries and exploration validation
description: Complete the missing parts of today's FlowForge upgrade: add human-readable ownership summaries to canonical templates, extend generator and validators, add exploration validation, and realign the data-service exploration/proposal docs in saas-service.
